sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 58 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 02.10.2025 Dr. Shah Nawaz Memon, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2020 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. On 09.11.2020, following order was passed: “09.11.2020 Counsel for the applicant is called absent, no intimation is received. In the interest of justice, one week’s time is granted to comply with the office objection.” Today once again time is sought for the same purpose. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
